title: Argentina Vehicle Title Transfer Application — Solicitud Tipo 08 (Contrato de Transferencia / Inscripción de Dominio)
description: The Registro Nacional de la Propiedad del Automotor's (DNRPA, Ministerio de Justicia y Derechos Humanos) 'Solicitud Tipo 08', the standard national request form used to record a private motor-vehicle ('automóvil') ownership transfer — the contract of transfer and the resulting title (dominio) inscription at the vehicle's Registro Seccional. The specimen is a genuinely flat/scanned 2-page pre-numbered carbon-form specimen (the 'Duplicado / Legajo A' copy of a multi-ply form; DNRPA's carbon-copy design means every ply — Original, Duplicado, etc. — carries identical fields) with 0 AcroForm widgets and 0 extractable text-layer characters (confirmed programmatically), so every field in this document was catalogued by visually rendering both pages and transcribing each printed box in reading order, not by widget extraction. The form captures: the contract's place/date and price (sección 'A'); the buyer/acquirer and, if applicable, a second co-owner ('condómino') buying jointly (secciones 'D'/'E'); the vehicle being transferred (sección 'F'); any prior liens the seller declares under oath (sección 'H'); the seller/transmitter and, if applicable, a second co-owner selling jointly (secciones 'I'/'J'); each of the four parties' attorney-in-fact ('apoderado'), if one is used instead of personal appearance (secciones 'K'/'L' and the apoderado sub-blocks of 'I'/'J'); free-form observations (sección 'M'); and, if the titular/apoderado does not appear in person, the person authorized to handle the paperwork and collect the resulting documents (sección 'O'). Out of scope: the form's pre-printed registry serial number and 'B'/'C'/'N' boxes (reserved for the Registro Seccional's own use, not applicant data), the 'OPTA SI/NO' box (tagged 'RESERVADO PARA EL REGISTRO' in the form's own left margin), every wet-ink signature line, and every notary/certifying-official block ('Certificación de Firma' / 'Fecha, Sello y Firma del Certificante') — these are produced by a third party at the moment of signing, not authored by the applicant when preparing the application. GovSchema is independent and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Argentine Republic, its Ministerio de Justicia y Derechos Humanos, or the DNRPA.

authority.name: Registro Nacional de la Propiedad del Automotor (DNRPA), Ministerio de Justicia y Derechos Humanos

source.documentRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 (automóvil variant, '08A.pdf') — 'Contrato de Transferencia - Inscripción de Dominio', DNRPA, 2-page flat/scanned pre-numbered specimen (Duplicado/Legajo A copy)

verification.notes: GOV-2187: opens Argentina's DMV vertical (3/6), following Business Formation (GOV-2169) and Visa (GOV-2179); Argentina's Passport and National ID verticals are confirmed dead ends (RENAPER is in-person/appointment-only). Fetched fresh with a browser User-Agent directly from dnrpa.gov.ar (HTTP 200, application/pdf, no login/CAPTCHA/WAF gate). Confirmed programmatically via pdfjs-dist (getFieldObjects(), getAnnotations(), getTextContent()) that this specimen has 0 AcroForm fields, 0 widgets, and 0 text-layer items across both pages — a genuinely flat/scanned image PDF, distinct from this registry's other 'flat' AR specimens (AFIP's 460/J and 460/F) which at least carry AcroForm structure or embedded text; here every field was catalogued by rasterizing both pages at 3x scale with pdfjs-dist+node-canvas and visually transcribing each printed box in reading order. The DNRPA's own general completion rules for Solicitudes Tipo (Digesto, Título I, Capítulo I, Sección 2ª, arts. 1-13, fetched from dnrpa.gov.ar/concursos_publicos/digesto12-04-2017/T1C1S2.htm) were used to resolve several judgment calls: art. 3 confirms the first two co-owners ('condóminos') share one set of Solicitudes Tipo (this document's own D/E and I/J column pairs) while additional co-owners require a further identical set (out of scope for this document); art. 4 confirms natural-person vs legal-entity name-formatting conventions and that no proof of civil status or spouse's surname is required; art. 13 confirms the buyer/acquirer's CUIT/CDI/CUIL is a mandatory accompanying requirement (modelled as required on the buyer, not the seller). The seller's own national identity document number is deliberately absent from this specimen's seller sections ('I'/'J' capture only name, ownership share, and marital status, not a document number) — confirmed by inspecting every text position in and around both sections at high resolution — consistent with the seller already being the registry's on-file titular (identified via the vehicle's dominio) whose identity is verified at signing via notarized signature certification rather than re-declared on this form. See VERIFICATION.md for the full sourcing record, every scope decision, and the mock conformance test run.

fields.name: contractPlaceAndDate
fields.label: Lugar y Fecha de Celebración del Contrato
fields.description: The place and date the transfer contract was executed, as a single combined entry (this box has no separate day/month/year sub-boxes, unlike the birth-date boxes elsewhere on the form).
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'A'

fields.name: purchasePrice
fields.label: Precio de Compra
fields.description: The purchase price. If the transfer arises from something other than a sale (cession, inheritance/succession, prize, etc.), the form directs the filer to write that concept here instead of a price ('en caso de cesión, sucesión, premio, etc. escribir el concepto').
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'A' — 'PRECIO DE COMPRA (EN CASO DE CESION, SUCESION, PREMIO, ETC. ESCRIBIR EL CONCEPTO)'

fields.name: buyerOwnershipPercentage
fields.label: Porcentaje del Vehículo que Compra o Adquiere
fields.description: The percentage of the vehicle the buyer is acquiring. The form's own instruction directs filers acquiring the whole vehicle to state 100.00 ('SI SE TRATA DE LA TOTALIDAD, INDICAR 100,00%').
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'D' 'COMPRADOR O ADQUIRENTE'

fields.name: buyerNameOrDenomination
fields.label: Apellido y Nombre o Denominación
fields.description: The buyer's surname(s) and given name(s) if a natural person, or the legal entity's denomination if a company/association. The form's own left-margin instructions direct natural persons to write surname(s) then given name(s) with no periods, commas, or abbreviations, and legal entities to copy their denomination verbatim from their constitutive contract/creation document.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'D' — 'APELLIDO Y NOMBRE O DENOMINACIÓN'

fields.name: buyerEmail
fields.label: E-Mail
fields.description: The buyer's email address.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'D' — 'E-MAIL'

fields.name: buyerPhone
fields.label: Teléfono
fields.description: The buyer's telephone number.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'D' — 'TELÉFONO'

fields.name: buyerLegalAddress
fields.label: Domicilio Legal
fields.description: The buyer's legal domicile (street, number, floor, unit, postal code, locality, partido/departamento, and province), modelled as a single composite field per this registry's established convention for multi-box address groups (spec v0.3 has no structured sub-object type). The form's own hint warns this address fixes where the vehicle will be registered ('SU DOMICILIO FIJARA EL LUGAR DE RADICACIÓN DEL VEHÍCULO').
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'D' — 'DOMICILIO LEGAL - CALLE' / 'NUMERO' / 'PISO' / 'DEP' / 'CODIGO POSTAL' / 'LOCALIDAD O C.A.B.A.' / 'PARTIDO O DEPARTAMENTO' / 'PROVINCIA'

fields.name: buyerActualAddress
fields.label: Domicilio Real
fields.description: The buyer's actual/real domicile, modelled as a single composite field (see buyerLegalAddress). For a legal-entity buyer this is typically the same as the legal domicile.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'D' — 'DOMICILIO REAL - CALLE' / 'NUMERO' / 'PISO' / 'DEP' / 'CODIGO POSTAL' / 'LOCALIDAD O C.A.B.A.' / 'PARTIDO O DEPARTAMENTO' / 'PROVINCIA'

fields.name: buyerProfessionOrActivity
fields.label: Profesión, Oficio o Act. Ppal.
fields.description: The buyer's profession, trade, or main activity. Applicable only when the buyer is a natural person — this row falls under the form's own left-margin 'PERSONAS FISICAS' category tag, distinct from the 'ENTES JURIDICOS' (legal entity) fields further down the same column.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'D' — 'PROFESION,OFICIO O ACT. PPAL.'

fields.name: buyerDocumentType
fields.label: Tipo de Documento
fields.description: The buyer's identity document type, from the form's own 6-option checkbox group distinguishing native/naturalized Argentines (options 1-3) from foreigners (options 4-6). Applicable only when the buyer is a natural person (see buyerProfessionOrActivity).
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'D' — 'ARGENTINOS NATIVOS O NATURALIZ.' (1 D.N.I., 2 L.E., 3 L.C.) / 'EXTRANJEROS' (4 D.N.I., 5 C.I., 6 PASAP.)

fields.name: buyerDocumentNumber
fields.label: N° de Documento
fields.description: The buyer's identity document number. Applicable only when the buyer is a natural person (see buyerProfessionOrActivity).
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'D' — 'N° DE DOCUMENTO'

fields.name: buyerDocumentIssuingAuthorityOrCountry
fields.label: Autoridad (o País) que lo Expidió
fields.description: The authority, or country, that issued the buyer's identity document. Applicable only when the buyer is a natural person (see buyerProfessionOrActivity).
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'D' — 'AUTORIDAD (O PAIS) QUE LO EXPIDIO'

fields.name: buyerTaxId
fields.label: CUIT - CUIL - CDI
fields.description: The buyer's federal tax/labor identification key (CUIT, CUIL, or CDI, as applicable). DNRPA's general completion rules (Digesto, Título I, Cap. I, Sec. 2ª, art. 13) require every acquirer petitioning a title-transfer inscription to prove this key to the Registro Seccional, so this field is modelled as required for the buyer regardless of natural-person/legal-entity status (both hold a CUIT/CUIL/CDI).
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'D' — 'CUIT. - CUIL. - CDI.'

fields.name: buyerPlaceOfBirth
fields.label: Lugar de Nacimiento
fields.description: The buyer's place of birth. Applicable only when the buyer is a natural person (see buyerProfessionOrActivity).
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'D' — 'LUGAR DE NACIMIENTO'

fields.name: buyerDateOfBirth
fields.label: Fecha de Nacimiento
fields.description: The buyer's date of birth, printed as separate day/month/year boxes. Applicable only when the buyer is a natural person (see buyerProfessionOrActivity).
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'D' — 'FECHA DE NACIMIENTO' (DIA/MES/AÑO)

fields.name: buyerMaritalStatus
fields.label: Estado Civil (Marcar con X lo que Corresponda)
fields.description: The buyer's marital status, from the form's own 4-option checkbox group. Applicable only when the buyer is a natural person (see buyerProfessionOrActivity). DNRPA's general completion rules (Digesto art. 4) note that no proof of civil status is required.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'D' — 1 SOLTERO, 2 CASADO, 3 VIUDO, 4 DIVORC.

fields.name: buyerMarriageRecordNumber
fields.label: Nupcias N°
fields.description: The sequence number of the buyer's marriage (e.g. '1' for a first marriage), printed alongside the marital-status checkboxes. Only answerable if the buyer is married.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'D' — 'NUPCIA N°'

fields.name: buyerSpouseName
fields.label: Apellido y Nombres del Cónyuge
fields.description: The buyer's spouse's surname(s) and given name(s), if the buyer is married. DNRPA's general completion rules (Digesto art. 4) note that either spouse may use the other's surname (with or without the 'de' preposition) and that no proof of the spouse's surname is required.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'D' — 'APELLIDO Y NOMBRES DEL CONYUGE'

fields.name: buyerLegalCapacityGrantedByAndDate
fields.label: Personería Otorgada Por
fields.description: The authority that granted the buyer's legal personhood, and the day/month/year it was granted. Applicable only when the buyer is a legal entity — this row falls under the form's own left-margin 'ENTES JURIDICOS' category tag. DNRPA's general completion rules (Digesto art. 9) note that companies/associations not requiring registration should state their creation date instead, and that public-law entities (government bodies) need only state their denomination.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'D' — 'PERSONERIA OTORGADA POR' (DIA/MES/AÑO)

fields.name: buyerRegistrationNumberOrDetails
fields.label: N° o Datos de Inscripción o Creación
fields.description: The buyer's registration or creation record number/details. Applicable only when the buyer is a legal entity (see buyerLegalCapacityGrantedByAndDate).
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'D' — 'N° O DATOS DE INSCRIPCION O CREACION'

fields.name: buyerRegistrationDate
fields.label: Fecha de Inscripción o Creación
fields.description: The date of the buyer's registration or creation. Applicable only when the buyer is a legal entity (see buyerLegalCapacityGrantedByAndDate).
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'D' — 'FECHA DE INSCRIPCION O CREACION'

fields.name: buyerCeta
fields.label: CETA
fields.description: A legal-entity identifier printed on the form as 'CETA', reproduced verbatim as no expansion of the abbreviation appears anywhere on the specimen. Applicable only when the buyer is a legal entity (see buyerLegalCapacityGrantedByAndDate).
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'D' — 'CETA:'

fields.name: coBuyerOwnershipPercentage
fields.label: Porcentaje del Vehículo que Compra o Adquiere (Condómino)
fields.description: The percentage of the vehicle a second, jointly-purchasing co-owner ('condómino') is acquiring. DNRPA's general completion rules (Digesto art. 3) confirm the first two co-owners share one set of Solicitudes Tipo (this document's sección 'E'); additional co-owners require a further identical set of forms, out of scope here. Applicable only if there is a second buyer.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'E' 'CONDOMINO EN LA COMPRA O ADQUISICION'

fields.name: coBuyerNameOrDenomination
fields.label: Apellido y Nombre o Denominación (Condómino)
fields.description: The co-buyer's surname(s)/given name(s) or legal-entity denomination, mirroring buyerNameOrDenomination. Applicable only if there is a second buyer.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'E' — 'APELLIDO Y NOMBRE O DENOMINACIÓN'

fields.name: coBuyerEmail
fields.label: E-Mail (Condómino)
fields.description: The co-buyer's email address. Applicable only if there is a second buyer.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'E' — 'E-MAIL'

fields.name: coBuyerPhone
fields.label: Teléfono (Condómino)
fields.description: The co-buyer's telephone number. Applicable only if there is a second buyer.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'E' — 'TELÉFONO'

fields.name: coBuyerLegalAddress
fields.label: Domicilio Legal (Condómino)
fields.description: The co-buyer's legal domicile, mirroring buyerLegalAddress (single composite field). Applicable only if there is a second buyer.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'E' — 'DOMICILIO LEGAL - CALLE' / 'NUMERO' / 'PISO' / 'DEP' / 'CODIGO POSTAL' / 'LOCALIDAD O C.A.B.A.' / 'PARTIDO O DEPARTAMENTO' / 'PROVINCIA'

fields.name: coBuyerActualAddress
fields.label: Domicilio Real (Condómino)
fields.description: The co-buyer's actual/real domicile, mirroring buyerActualAddress (single composite field). Applicable only if there is a second buyer.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'E' — 'DOMICILIO REAL - CALLE' / 'NUMERO' / 'PISO' / 'DEP' / 'CODIGO POSTAL' / 'LOCALIDAD O C.A.B.A.' / 'PARTIDO O DEPARTAMENTO' / 'PROVINCIA'

fields.name: coBuyerProfessionOrActivity
fields.label: Profesión, Oficio o Act. Ppal. (Condómino)
fields.description: The co-buyer's profession, trade, or main activity. Applicable only if there is a second, natural-person buyer.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'E' — 'PROFESION,OFICIO O ACT. PPAL.'

fields.name: coBuyerDocumentType
fields.label: Tipo de Documento (Condómino)
fields.description: The co-buyer's identity document type, mirroring buyerDocumentType. Applicable only if there is a second, natural-person buyer.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'E' — 'ARGENTINOS NATIVOS O NATURALIZ.' (1 D.N.I., 2 L.E., 3 L.C.) / 'EXTRANJEROS' (4 D.N.I., 5 C.I., 6 PASAP.)

fields.name: coBuyerDocumentNumber
fields.label: N° de Documento (Condómino)
fields.description: The co-buyer's identity document number. Applicable only if there is a second, natural-person buyer.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'E' — 'N° DE DOCUMENTO'

fields.name: coBuyerDocumentIssuingAuthorityOrCountry
fields.label: Autoridad (o País) que lo Expidió (Condómino)
fields.description: The authority, or country, that issued the co-buyer's identity document. Applicable only if there is a second, natural-person buyer.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'E' — 'AUTORIDAD (O PAIS) QUE LO EXPIDIO'

fields.name: coBuyerTaxId
fields.label: CUIT - CUIL - CDI (Condómino)
fields.description: The co-buyer's federal tax/labor identification key. Applicable only if there is a second buyer.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'E' — 'CUIT. - CUIL. - CDI.'

fields.name: coBuyerPlaceOfBirth
fields.label: Lugar de Nacimiento (Condómino)
fields.description: The co-buyer's place of birth. Applicable only if there is a second, natural-person buyer.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'E' — 'LUGAR DE NACIMIENTO'

fields.name: coBuyerDateOfBirth
fields.label: Fecha de Nacimiento (Condómino)
fields.description: The co-buyer's date of birth. Applicable only if there is a second, natural-person buyer.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'E' — 'FECHA DE NACIMIENTO' (DIA/MES/AÑO)

fields.name: coBuyerMaritalStatus
fields.label: Estado Civil (Condómino)
fields.description: The co-buyer's marital status, mirroring buyerMaritalStatus. Applicable only if there is a second, natural-person buyer.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'E' — 1 SOLTERO, 2 CASADO, 3 VIUDO, 4 DIVORC.

fields.name: coBuyerMarriageRecordNumber
fields.label: Nupcias N° (Condómino)
fields.description: The sequence number of the co-buyer's marriage. Only answerable if the co-buyer is married.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'E' — 'NUPCIA N°'

fields.name: coBuyerSpouseName
fields.label: Apellido y Nombres del Cónyuge (Condómino)
fields.description: The co-buyer's spouse's surname(s) and given name(s), if the co-buyer is married.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'E' — 'APELLIDO Y NOMBRES DEL CONYUGE'

fields.name: coBuyerLegalCapacityGrantedByAndDate
fields.label: Personería Otorgada Por (Condómino)
fields.description: The authority that granted the co-buyer's legal personhood, and when. Applicable only if there is a second, legal-entity buyer.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'E' — 'PERSONERIA OTORGADA POR' (DIA/MES/AÑO)

fields.name: coBuyerRegistrationNumberOrDetails
fields.label: N° o Datos de Inscripción o Creación (Condómino)
fields.description: The co-buyer's registration or creation record number/details. Applicable only if there is a second, legal-entity buyer.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'E' — 'N° O DATOS DE INSCRIPCION O CREACION'

fields.name: coBuyerRegistrationDate
fields.label: Fecha de Inscripción o Creación (Condómino)
fields.description: The date of the co-buyer's registration or creation. Applicable only if there is a second, legal-entity buyer.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'E' — 'FECHA DE INSCRIPCION O CREACION'

fields.name: coBuyerCeta
fields.label: CETA (Condómino)
fields.description: The co-buyer's 'CETA' identifier, reproduced verbatim (see buyerCeta). Applicable only if there is a second, legal-entity buyer.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'E' — 'CETA:'

fields.name: vehicleLicensePlate
fields.label: Dominio (N° de Chapa o Patente)
fields.description: The vehicle's license-plate/registration identifier ('dominio'). This same box also appears as a cross-reference in sección 'A'; both are modelled as this single field, per this document's own instruction that the dominio number be consigned wherever it recurs on the form.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'F' 'VEHICULO QUE SE TRANSFIERE' — 'DOMINIO (Nº DE CHAPA O PATENTE)'

fields.name: vehicleMake
fields.label: Marca
fields.description: The vehicle's make/brand. DNRPA's general completion rules (Digesto art. 11) direct this to be copied verbatim from the vehicle's título or legajo records (or, for an initial registration, from the manufacture/import certificate).
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'F' — 'MARCA'

fields.name: vehicleType
fields.label: Tipo
fields.description: The vehicle's type (e.g. sedán, pick-up), copied verbatim from the título/legajo (see vehicleMake).
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'F' — 'TIPO'

fields.name: vehicleModel
fields.label: Modelo
fields.description: The vehicle's model (and typically model year), copied verbatim from the título/legajo (see vehicleMake).
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'F' — 'MODELO'

fields.name: engineMake
fields.label: Marca Motor
fields.description: The engine's make/brand, copied verbatim from the título/legajo (see vehicleMake).
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'F' — 'MARCA MOTOR'

fields.name: engineNumber
fields.label: N° de Motor
fields.description: The engine's serial number. The form's own left-margin instruction permits omitting the manufacturer series prefix if the título/cédula records omit it too ('COMPLETAR LOS NUMEROS DE MOTOR Y CHASIS OMITIENDO LAS SERIES SI ESTUVIERAN CONSIGNADAS EN DICHOS DOCUMENTOS').
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'F' — 'N° DE MOTOR'

fields.name: chassisMake
fields.label: Marca de Chasis
fields.description: The chassis's make/brand, copied verbatim from the título/legajo (see vehicleMake).
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'F' — 'MARCA DE CHASIS'

fields.name: chassisNumber
fields.label: N° de Chasis
fields.description: The chassis's serial number (see engineNumber for the series-omission rule).
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'F' — 'N° DE CHASIS'

fields.name: vehicleUse
fields.label: Uso
fields.description: The vehicle's declared use/category (e.g. particular, taxi, carga), copied verbatim from the título/legajo (see vehicleMake).
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'F' — 'USO'

fields.name: priorLienRegistrationDate
fields.label: Fecha de Inscripción (Deuda/Gravamen)
fields.description: The registration date of a debt/lien ('prenda') the seller declares under oath still encumbers the vehicle. The section's own printed text is itself a sworn declaration that the vehicle carries no undeclared debts or liens ('LOS VENDEDORES O TRANSMITENTES DECLARAN BAJO JURAMENTO... QUE EL VEHICULO... NO RECONOCE DEUDAS, GRAVAMENES, NI OTRA/S PRENDA/S... QUE LA/S QUE SE DECLARAN SEGUIDAMENTE'); leaving this row blank is itself the declaration of no prior liens, consistent with the left-margin instruction that this section is completed only if the vehicle carries a pre-existing lien ('COMPLETAR SOLAMENTE SI EL VEHICULO SE ENAJENA CON PRENDAS ANTERIORES A ESTA TRANSFERENCIA').
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'H' 'DEUDAS Y GRAVAMENES DECLARADOS POR EL VENDEDOR' — 'FECHA DE INSCRIPCION'

fields.name: priorLienAmount
fields.label: Importe (Deuda/Gravamen)
fields.description: The amount of the declared prior debt/lien (see priorLienRegistrationDate).
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'H' — 'IMPORTE'

fields.name: priorLienCreditor
fields.label: Acreedor (Deuda/Gravamen)
fields.description: The creditor of the declared prior debt/lien (see priorLienRegistrationDate).
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.1, sección 'H' — 'ACREEDOR'

fields.name: sellerOwnershipPercentage
fields.label: Porcentaje del Vehículo que Vende o Transmite
fields.description: The percentage of the vehicle the seller/transmitter is selling.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.2, sección 'I' 'VENDEDOR O TRANSMITENTE'

fields.name: sellerNameOrDenomination
fields.label: Apellido y Nombres o Denominación del Vendedor
fields.description: The seller's surname(s)/given name(s) or legal-entity denomination. Unlike the buyer sections ('D'/'E'), this section carries no separate national-identity-document-number box for the seller themselves — only for their attorney-in-fact (sellerAttorneyDocumentNumber), if one is used — consistent with the seller already being the registry's on-file titular, identified via the vehicle's dominio, whose identity is confirmed at signing through notarized signature certification rather than re-declared here.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.2, sección 'I' — 'APELLIDO Y NOMBRES O DENOMINACION DEL VENDEDOR'

fields.name: sellerMaritalStatus
fields.label: Estado Civil del Vendedor
fields.description: The seller's marital status, from the form's own 4-option checkbox group.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.2, sección 'I' — 'ESTADO CIVIL DEL VENDEDOR': 1 SOLTERO, 2 CASADO, 3 VIUDO, 4 DIVORC.

fields.name: sellerMarriageRecordNumber
fields.label: Nupcias N° (Vendedor)
fields.description: The sequence number of the seller's marriage. Only answerable if the seller is married.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.2, sección 'I' — 'NUPCIA N°'

fields.name: sellerSpouseName
fields.label: Apellido y Nombres del Cónyuge del Vendedor o Transmitente
fields.description: The seller's spouse's surname(s) and given name(s), captured because the spouse must independently consent to (and sign) the transfer of marital-property vehicles ('CONYUGE/S O SU/S APODERADO/S (CONSENTIMIENTO ART. 1277 CODIGO CIVIL)'). Applicable only if the seller is married.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.2, sección 'I' — 'APELLIDO Y NOMBRES DEL CONYUGE DEL VENDEDOR O TRANSMITENTE'

fields.name: sellerAttorneyName
fields.label: Apellido y Nombres del Apoderado (Vendedor)
fields.description: The name of the seller's attorney-in-fact ('apoderado'), if the seller uses a proxy to sign rather than appearing personally.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.2, sección 'I' — 'APELLIDO Y NOMBRES DEL APODERADO'

fields.name: sellerAttorneyDocumentType
fields.label: Tipo de Documento del Apoderado (Vendedor)
fields.description: The identity document type of the seller's attorney-in-fact, from the same 6-option checkbox group used elsewhere on this form. Applicable only if the seller uses an attorney-in-fact.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.2, sección 'I' — 'ARGENTINOS NATIVOS O NATURALIZ.' (1 D.N.I., 2 L.E., 3 L.C.) / 'EXTRANJEROS' (4 D.N.I., 5 C.I., 6 PASAP.)

fields.name: sellerAttorneyDocumentNumber
fields.label: N° de Documento del Apoderado (Vendedor)
fields.description: The identity document number of the seller's attorney-in-fact. Applicable only if the seller uses an attorney-in-fact.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.2, sección 'I' — 'NUMERO DE DOCUMENTO'

fields.name: sellerAttorneyIssuingAuthority
fields.label: Autoridad (o País) que lo Expidió (Apoderado, Vendedor)
fields.description: The authority, or country, that issued the seller's attorney-in-fact's identity document. Applicable only if the seller uses an attorney-in-fact.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.2, sección 'I' — 'AUTORIDAD (O PAIS) QUE LO EXPIDIO'

fields.name: coSellerOwnershipPercentage
fields.label: Porcentaje del Vehículo que Vende o Transmite (Condómino)
fields.description: The percentage of the vehicle a second, jointly-selling co-owner is selling. Applicable only if there is a second seller (see coBuyerOwnershipPercentage for the same first-two-condóminos-per-form-set rule, applied here to the selling side).
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.2, sección 'J' 'CONDOMINO EN LA VENTA O TRANSMISION'

fields.name: coSellerNameOrDenomination
fields.label: Apellido y Nombres o Denominación del Vendedor (Condómino)
fields.description: The co-seller's surname(s)/given name(s) or legal-entity denomination, mirroring sellerNameOrDenomination. Applicable only if there is a second seller.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.2, sección 'J' — 'APELLIDO Y NOMBRES O DENOMINACION DEL VENDEDOR'

fields.name: coSellerMaritalStatus
fields.label: Estado Civil del Vendedor (Condómino)
fields.description: The co-seller's marital status, mirroring sellerMaritalStatus. Applicable only if there is a second seller.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.2, sección 'J' — 1 SOLTERO, 2 CASADO, 3 VIUDO, 4 DIVORC.

fields.name: coSellerMarriageRecordNumber
fields.label: Nupcias N° (Vendedor Condómino)
fields.description: The sequence number of the co-seller's marriage. Only answerable if the co-seller is married.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.2, sección 'J' — 'NUPCIA N°'

fields.name: coSellerSpouseName
fields.label: Apellido y Nombres del Cónyuge del Condómino Vendedor
fields.description: The co-seller's spouse's surname(s) and given name(s) (see sellerSpouseName). Applicable only if there is a second seller who is married.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.2, sección 'J' — 'APELLIDO Y NOMBRES DEL CONYUGE DEL CONDOMINO DEL VENDEDOR O TRANSMITENTE'

fields.name: coSellerAttorneyName
fields.label: Apellido y Nombres del Apoderado (Vendedor Condómino)
fields.description: The name of the co-seller's attorney-in-fact, mirroring sellerAttorneyName. Applicable only if there is a second seller who uses an attorney-in-fact.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.2, sección 'J' — 'APELLIDO Y NOMBRES DEL APODERADO'

fields.name: coSellerAttorneyDocumentType
fields.label: Tipo de Documento del Apoderado (Vendedor Condómino)
fields.description: The identity document type of the co-seller's attorney-in-fact. Applicable only if there is a second seller who uses an attorney-in-fact.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.2, sección 'J' — 'ARGENTINOS NATIVOS O NATURALIZ.' (1 D.N.I., 2 L.E., 3 L.C.) / 'EXTRANJEROS' (4 D.N.I., 5 C.I., 6 PASAP.)

fields.name: coSellerAttorneyDocumentNumber
fields.label: N° de Documento del Apoderado (Vendedor Condómino)
fields.description: The identity document number of the co-seller's attorney-in-fact. Applicable only if there is a second seller who uses an attorney-in-fact.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.2, sección 'J' — 'NUMERO DE DOCUMENTO'

fields.name: coSellerAttorneyIssuingAuthority
fields.label: Autoridad (o País) que lo Expidió (Apoderado, Vendedor Condómino)
fields.description: The authority, or country, that issued the co-seller's attorney-in-fact's identity document. Applicable only if there is a second seller who uses an attorney-in-fact.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.2, sección 'J' — 'AUTORIDAD (O PAIS) QUE LO EXPIDIO'

fields.name: buyerAttorneyName
fields.label: Apellido y Nombres del Apoderado (Comprador)
fields.description: The name of the buyer's attorney-in-fact, if the buyer uses a proxy to sign rather than appearing personally. This section captures only the attorney-in-fact's identity — the buyer's own data is already captured in full in sección 'D'.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.2, sección 'K' 'COMPRADOR O ADQUIRENTE' — 'APELLIDO Y NOMBRES DEL APODERADO'

fields.name: buyerAttorneyDocumentType
fields.label: Tipo de Documento del Apoderado (Comprador)
fields.description: The identity document type of the buyer's attorney-in-fact. Applicable only if the buyer uses an attorney-in-fact.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.2, sección 'K' — 'ARGENTINOS NATIVOS O NATURALIZ.' (1 D.N.I., 2 L.E., 3 L.C.) / 'EXTRANJEROS' (4 D.N.I., 5 C.I., 6 PASAP.)

fields.name: buyerAttorneyDocumentNumber
fields.label: N° de Documento del Apoderado (Comprador)
fields.description: The identity document number of the buyer's attorney-in-fact. Applicable only if the buyer uses an attorney-in-fact.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.2, sección 'K' — 'NUMERO DE DOCUMENTO'

fields.name: buyerAttorneyIssuingAuthority
fields.label: Autoridad (o País) que lo Expidió (Apoderado, Comprador)
fields.description: The authority, or country, that issued the buyer's attorney-in-fact's identity document. Applicable only if the buyer uses an attorney-in-fact.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.2, sección 'K' — 'AUTORIDAD (O PAIS) QUE LO EXPIDIO'

fields.name: coBuyerAttorneyName
fields.label: Apellido y Nombres del Apoderado (Comprador Condómino)
fields.description: The name of the co-buyer's attorney-in-fact, mirroring buyerAttorneyName. Applicable only if there is a second buyer who uses an attorney-in-fact.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.2, sección 'L' 'CONDOMINO EN LA COMPRA O ADQUISICION' — 'APELLIDO Y NOMBRES DEL APODERADO'

fields.name: coBuyerAttorneyDocumentType
fields.label: Tipo de Documento del Apoderado (Comprador Condómino)
fields.description: The identity document type of the co-buyer's attorney-in-fact. Applicable only if there is a second buyer who uses an attorney-in-fact.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.2, sección 'L' — 'ARGENTINOS NATIVOS O NATURALIZ.' (1 D.N.I., 2 L.E., 3 L.C.) / 'EXTRANJEROS' (4 D.N.I., 5 C.I., 6 PASAP.)

fields.name: coBuyerAttorneyDocumentNumber
fields.label: N° de Documento del Apoderado (Comprador Condómino)
fields.description: The identity document number of the co-buyer's attorney-in-fact. Applicable only if there is a second buyer who uses an attorney-in-fact.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.2, sección 'L' — 'NUMERO DE DOCUMENTO'

fields.name: coBuyerAttorneyIssuingAuthority
fields.label: Autoridad (o País) que lo Expidió (Apoderado, Comprador Condómino)
fields.description: The authority, or country, that issued the co-buyer's attorney-in-fact's identity document. Applicable only if there is a second buyer who uses an attorney-in-fact.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.2, sección 'L' — 'AUTORIDAD (O PAIS) QUE LO EXPIDIO'

fields.name: observations
fields.label: Observaciones
fields.description: Free-form observations: necessary clarifications, a list of other documents accompanying this filing, or the record of any correction/erasure and its accompanying signature, per DNRPA's general completion rules (Digesto art. 12). The form's own left-margin instruction directs filers to cross out any unused space in this box ('TACHAR INDEFECTIBLEMENTE LOS ESPACIOS NO UTILIZADOS').
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.2, sección 'M' 'OBSERVACIONES'

fields.name: authorizedAgentName
fields.label: Autorizo a
fields.description: The name of the person authorized to handle the filing and collect the resulting documentation on the titular's behalf, if the titular (or their attorney-in-fact) does not appear in person ('DE NO CONCURRIR EL TITULAR O SU APODERADO COMPLETAR CON LOS DATOS DE LA PERSONA AUTORIZADA A REALIZAR EL TRAMITE').
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.2, sección 'O' — 'AUTORIZO A'

fields.name: authorizedAgentDocumentTypeAndNumber
fields.label: Tipo de Documento y N° (Autorizado)
fields.description: The identity document type and number of the person authorized under authorizedAgentName; only answerable once that field is filled in. Modelled as a single combined field, matching this box's own printed layout (unlike the form's other identity-document boxes, this one has no separate checkbox group for document type). Deliberately not gated with `requiredWhen` against `authorizedAgentName`: the condition grammar (GSP-0013) has no field-presence operator, and a `notEquals` sentinel-value comparison against an absent optional field evaluates `undefined !== ''` as true, misfiring as always-required rather than only-when-filled.
fields.sourceRef: Solicitud Tipo 08 p.2, sección 'O' — 'TIPO DE DOCUMENTO Y N°'
